# Chapter 13: Information theory  (~100 pp)
- 13.1 Shannon entropy (15) · 13.2 Source coding (15) · 13.3 Channel capacity (15) · 13.4 Error-correcting codes (15) · 13.5 Mutual information and Kullback-Leibler divergence (12) · 13.6 Information theory in physics, biology, ML (15) · 13.7 Failure section: codes pushed beyond Shannon limit; AI claims violating information conservation (13)

**Archetype**: balance, scaling. **Project**: implement Huffman coding and a Reed-Solomon code; benchmark on real data. **Exercises**: 30.
